gist.headline: Serverless dreams
gist.blurb: Dream-Stream just landed in the community showcase! It's a slick serverless gallery using Cloudflare Workers to turn your prompts into beautiful art.
gist.summary: Added Dream-Stream, a serverless image generation gallery built with Cloudflare Workers, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can explore Dream-Stream in the apps directory to see a great example of building lightweight, serverless AI art galleries.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a glowing stream of floating picture frames in a cozy garden, representing the 'Dream-Stream' gallery.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a chunky monitor robot sitting by a gentle stream where glowing picture frames float by like dreams. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
